results.title: Indian football amid FIFA WC: Young gen proves future isn’t all gloomy
results.description: While India watches the FIFA World Cup from the sidelines, two young young are showing the country has the talent to dream bigger.

results.title: Supreme Court Fines Samay Raina, Others ₹3 lakh For Violating Orders To Publicize Cause Of Specially Abled Persons
results.description: Supreme Court has imposed fine on Raina and others for not publicizing the cause of specially abled persons on their platforms and generating funds to provide timely treatment to specially abled.

results.title: Tripura Woman Says Owning A Paris Home Comes With More Than Just A Rs 1.4 Lakh EMI: ‘No Family Money, No Shortcut’
results.description: At 28, a woman from Tripura bought a home near Paris, but says the Rs 1.4 lakh EMI is only one part of the cost. She reveals the expenses no one warned her about before buying

results.title: India bans the import of goods made using forced labour, even as U.S. investigation is pending
results.description: India bans imports of goods made with forced labor, aligning trade policies with international standards amid pending U.S. tariffs.

results.title: Honasa Consumer appoints Shivang Jain as CEO of BTM Ventures; says, 'He understands our playbook'
results.description: Honasa Consumer, the beauty and personal care company, has named Shivang Jain CEO of BTM Ventures, the subsidiary behind personal care brands Reginald Men and Molecular Company. Jain will oversee the company’s strategy, operations and growth, with responsibility for the next stage of expansion at both brands. Honasa, the parent company of Mamaearth said the internal appointment reflected its focus on developing leadership talent from within the business. The move follows Honasa’s acquisition of a 95% stake in BTM Ventures . The deal was announced in December 2025 and completed in January 2026, when BTM Ventures became a subsidiary of the beauty and personal care company. Before taking on the role, Jain served as vice-president of corporate strategy and chief of staff at Honasa. He worked with the company’s founders on corporate strategy, portfolio expansion, business planning and other strategic projects. Varun Alagh, co-founder and CEO of Honasa Consumer, said Jain had played an important role in the company’s development. “Shivang has been at the core of many of our strategic initiatives and has played an important role in shaping Honasa’s growth journey,” Alagh said. “He understands our playbook for building and scaling consumer-first brands and has consistently demonstrated the ability to translate ideas into execution,” he added. Jain said he was excited to lead the next stage of growth at BTM Ventures. “I look forward to working closely with our talented team to strengthen Reginald Men and Molecular Company, accelerate innovation, and create meaningful value for our consumers,” he said. Jain has more than 10 years of experience in corporate strategy, mergers and acquisitions, and business transformation. Before joining Honasa, he held positions in investment banking and consulting, including roles at Avendus Capital, EY and JPMorgan Chase & Co. He holds a Post Graduate Diploma in Business Management from XLRI Jamshedpur.

results.title: Elevation Capital has closed USD 500 Million India fund to back AI startups
results.description: Elevation Capital has closed its ninth India-focused fund at USD 500 Million, with a focus on backing early-stage startups building AI-led products and applications. The new fund will invest primarily in seed and Series A startups, particularly those building on the application layer of AI. The firm believes the next [...]
